perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A young woman with long dark hair, wearing a black crop top and matching shorts, is positioned in the center of a room with a white brick accent wall and dark wood flooring. She initiates a dance routine with precise arm movements and rhythmic stepping. (2) As the routine progresses, she incorporates fluid hip motions and energetic hair flips, maintaining a concentrated and confident facial expression while moving across the frame. (3) The dancer concludes the sequence with a final choreographed pose, raising her arms to her head and looking directly at the camera.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) An upbeat electronic pop track begins immediately, featuring a clear female vocal singing the phrase 'That's right, I did that'. The BGM has a steady, rhythmic drum machine beat. (2) The vocals repeat the lyrical hook over the same energetic tempo; no ambient noise or external sound effects are present in the studio-quality recording. (3) The music maintains its intensity through the end of the clip, concluding with the rhythmic instrumental beat as the vocals cease.
